case_title: TROY MCALISTER VS. DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCALISTER, TROY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-17-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-09-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF TROY MCALISTER IS PRESENT BY DECLARATION. DEFENDANT ALAMEDA DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES IS NT PRESENT. DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES(S.F.) IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELE FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR BOTH DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES (S.F.) RETAINS RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-16-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TROY MCALISTER BY DECLARATION. APPEARANCE DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVIECES, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT ALAMEDA COUNTY DEPARTMENT CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES DID NOT APPEAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON ALAMEDA COUNTY DEPARTMENT CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WILL NOT STIPULATE FOR A JUDGE PROTEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PROTEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $235.61 FILED BY MCALISTER, TROY AS TO DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES ALAMEDA DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SMALL CLAIMS COURT HAS NO JURISDICTION TO RULE ON CHILD SUPPORT ORDERS. SEE MARRIAGE OF LACKEY (1983) 143 CA 3D 698. PLAINTIFF TROY MCALISTER WAS PRESENT BY DECLARATION. DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELL FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT ALAMEDA DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BENTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED MAR-01-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-17-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF TROY MCALISTER IS PRESENT BY DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 116.540(F). DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT ALAMEDA CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR SAN FRANCISCO DEPT. OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES IS DEFECTIVE AS PROPER AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS WAS NOT SERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DEPARTMENT OF CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-15-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF BY DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 116.540(F). DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TRICIA PEARSE-WILLIAMS, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO APPEARNCE BY ALAMEDA DEPT OF CHILD SERVICES. NO PROOF OF SERVICES FILED. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
